name: On the Double Credit Repair Service Los Angeles
description_short: On the Double Credit Repair Service offers credit repair and dispute services in Los Angeles. Contact them at 424-363-7581 for credit report corrections.
description_long:
On the Double Credit Repair Service is a Los Angeles-based credit repair company located at 4800 Main St #795 in the 90037 zip code. The company operates in the credit repair and financial services sector, focusing on helping consumers address issues on their credit reports. Based on their categorization and service name, they position themselves as a credit dispute and repair provider serving the Los Angeles area and surrounding communities.

The company offers credit repair services, which typically include reviewing credit reports for errors, disputing inaccurate or fraudulent items with credit bureaus, and working to improve consumers' credit profiles. As a credit repair service provider, they would generally handle common credit report issues such as late payments, collections accounts, charge-offs, and identity theft-related damage. Their service name "On the Double" suggests an emphasis on prompt turnaround and efficient dispute processing.

The company maintains a straightforward business model with direct phone contact available at 424-363-7581. They are listed in the Professional Business Directory under both the "Credit Repair" and "Financial and insurance services" categories, indicating their focus on consumer financial health and credit restoration. Their Los Angeles location positions them to serve Southern California residents dealing with credit issues.

A critical limitation is the lack of detailed information about their specific processes, pricing, results, customer reviews, or regulatory compliance status on their listing. Consumers considering this service should verify their credentials, understand their fee structure, review any available customer feedback, and confirm they comply with the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which strictly regulates credit repair services. The sparse online presence and absence of reviews on their directory listing makes independent verification of their track record essential before engaging their services.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Located in Los Angeles with direct phone contact (424-363-7581) for local accessibility
Specifically named as a credit repair service, indicating focus on dispute resolution
Listed in professional business directory with verifiable business address
Serves the Los Angeles area, providing location-specific credit repair expertise
cons: No customer reviews or ratings available on the directory listing
Minimal online presence with very limited company information disclosed
No pricing, fee structure, or service guarantees visible on the website
No information about CROA compliance, credentials, or regulatory licensing displayed
No description of specific services offered or typical dispute resolution timelines
best_for: Los Angeles residents with errors on their credit reports seeking local dispute services
Consumers wanting direct phone contact with a credit repair representative
diagnosis: On the Double Credit Repair Service is positioned for Los Angeles consumers seeking credit repair and dispute services. However, the substantial lack of publicly available information, customer reviews, detailed service descriptions, and compliance documentation presents a significant caveat—prospective clients must conduct thorough independent verification before committing to any services or fees.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
